data.title: New Balance expands its resale platform with addition of apparel
data.description: The two-year-old Reconsidered program will introduce more New Balance-branded products at a time when resale options are in demand.

data.title: B2B and B2C companies increase AI investment as agentic commerce gains traction
data.description: Close to half of the organizations surveyed, 47.3%, said they plan to invest at least $1 million in AI commerce initiatives over the next 12 months.

data.title: Stitch Fix revenue rises as CEO credits AI tools in Q2
data.description: Net revenue grew 9.4% year over year in Stitch Fix's fiscal Q2 2026 as the company put its AI Style Assistant and Stitch Fix Vision to use.

data.title: War escalation raises shipping costs and delivery risks for B2B sellers
data.description: If war in the Middle East continues, analysts said the effects could extend beyond freight markets and energy prices, reshaping sourcing and logistics strategies that support global B2B ecommerce.

data.title: Adobe CEO decides to transition out of role
data.description: Shantanu Narayen has served as the Adobe CEO for 18 years. He said will remain chair of the board and help the directors select a suitable successor.
